description_long: This house is a large, single-story structure with a prominent dark hip roof and a cross symbol on the front, suggesting it may serve a dual residential and community function. The building is centrally located within a fenced rectangular plot, surrounded by manicured green lawns and paved walkways. Two symmetrical gazebos are positioned at the front corners inside the fence, while additional outbuildings and landscaped features, such as a fountain and benches, are distributed around the property. The main entrance features a covered porch with steps leading up to double doors, flanked by columns and highlighted by the cross above. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows along the facade, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. The perimeter is enclosed by a light-colored fence with regularly spaced pillars and gates, enhancing the sense of privacy and formality.
description: A large, single-story house with a dark hip roof, cross symbol, and symmetrical layout, set within a fenced, landscaped property featuring gazebos and outbuildings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a cross above, two gazebos inside the fence, and a clear view of the landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the side entry, and the arrangement of outbuildings and walkways.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional outbuildings, and the rear section of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side facade, gazebos, and the layout of the property from a different angle.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with steps, covered porch, columns, and a prominent cross above the entrance.
